query:
SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, a.id as crmId, a.membershipTier
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN agent_crm_profiles a ON a.userId = u.id
WHERE u.name LIKE '%Rick%' OR u.name LIKE '%Berry%' OR u.name LIKE '%Shah%'
LIMIT 5;
